# Hadi Abou Daya - AI/ML Consultant & Software Engineer

> Personal portfolio and blog of Hadi Abou Daya, an AI/ML Consultant, Cloud Architect, Web3 Builder, and Software Engineer based in Paris, France. Building intelligent systems from edge to cloud.

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/): Overview, hero section, and highlights
- [About](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/about/): Bio, key facts, languages, and personal journey
- [Experience](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/experience/): Career timeline from 2018 to present
- [Events](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/events/): Workshops, conferences, hackathons, and milestones
- [Certifications](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/certifications/): Industry-recognized certifications (AWS, Azure, PMP, AI/ML)
- [Blog](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/blog/): Articles on AI, machine learning, causal inference, and engineering
- [Contact](https://hadi.aboudaya.com/contact/): Contact form and booking

## Expertise

- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- LLM Agents, Agentic Applications, and Multi-Agent Systems
- Cloud Architecture and Deployments (AWS, Azure)
- Blockchain and Web3 Development
- Computer Vision and Edge AI
- RAG Systems and Knowledge Graphs
- Causal Inference and Data Science
- Software Engineering (Full-Stack)

## About Hadi Abou Daya

Hadi Abou Daya is an AI/ML Consultant and Software Engineer based in Paris, France. He specializes in building intelligent systems spanning edge devices to cloud-scale infrastructure. His core expertise includes designing and deploying LLM agent architectures, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines, computer vision models, and cloud-native AI solutions. He holds AWS ML Specialty and Cloud Practitioner certifications, a PMP credential, and degrees from emlyon business school and McGill University. He actively speaks at conferences, hosts workshops, and contributes to the AWS User Group Lebanon community.
